Package org.areslib.hmi

Class TelemetryGamepad

java.lang.Object
org.areslib.hmi.TelemetryGamepad
public class TelemetryGamepad extends Object
A wrapper for gamepad controls that automatically logs button bindings to telemetry.

This allows dashboards to visually represent controller bindings and provides runtime visibility into what actions are mapped to which buttons.

Essential for driver training and debugging controller configurations.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructor
    Description
    TelemetryGamepad(String gamepadIdentity)
    Creates a telemetry-enabled gamepad wrapper.

    Method

    Trigger
    bindOnFalse(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command command)
    Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onFalse()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.

    Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.

    Binds a command to toggle on a Trigger.

    Binds a command to a Trigger's `.whileTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.

  • Constructor Details

    • TelemetryGamepad

      public TelemetryGamepad(String gamepadIdentity)
      Creates a telemetry-enabled gamepad wrapper.
      Parameters:
      gamepadIdentity - Unique identifier for this gamepad (e.g., "Driver", "Operator")

  • Method Details

    • bindOnTrue

      public Trigger bindOnTrue(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command command)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g., gamepad.a())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g., "A_Button")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g., "Score Gamepiece")
      command - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • bindWhileTrue

      public Trigger bindWhileTrue(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command command)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.whileTrue()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g., gamepad.rightTrigger())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g., "RightTrigger")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g., "Shoot On Move")
      command - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • bindOnFalse

      public Trigger bindOnFalse(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command command)
      Binds a command to a Trigger's `.onFalse()` scheduling method while automatically publishing the mapped action name to telemetry.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance (e.g., gamepad.a())
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name (e.g., "A_Button")
      actionName - The macro the button runs (e.g., "Retract System")
      command - The Command to schedule
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • bindToggle

      public Trigger bindToggle(Trigger trigger, String buttonName, String actionName, Command command)
      Binds a command to toggle on a Trigger.
      Parameters:
      trigger - The Trigger instance
      buttonName - The human-readable physical button name
      actionName - The macro the button runs
      command - The Command to toggle
      Returns:
      The Trigger to allow method chaining

    • getBindingsMap

      public Map<String,String> getBindingsMap()
      Gets the current button bindings map.
      Returns:
      Map of button names to action names

    • getGamepadIdentity

      public String getGamepadIdentity()
      Gets the gamepad identity string.
      Returns:
      The gamepad identity
